high_findings.code_snippet: const diagnostic = new vscode.Diagnostic(range, 'Avoid using eval() - Security risk', vscode.DiagnosticSeverity.Error);
const action = new vscode.CodeAction('Remove eval() (manual fix required)', vscode.CodeActionKind.QuickFix);
